# Phase 6 ops-alert golden file. Plan 06-01 (Wave 0) creates placeholders;
# Plan 06-02 (Wave 1) test_message_builder.py replaces the placeholder
# lines with the real output of build_ops_alert(...) for each scenario.
#
# 5 scenarios per D-610 + RESEARCH §Pattern 4 + Pitfall A:
#   1. upstream_status_failed  (matcher gate-trip — runs.status='failed')
#   2. xlsx_oversize           (REPORT-06 D-515 cascade — size_guard_passed=False)
#   3. empty_summary_text      (reporter D-507 skip — summary_text='')
#   4. no_xlsx_in_stats        (matcher skipped → no reporter — xlsx_path='')
#   5. delivery_exception      (Pitfall A — TelegramBadRequest/Forbidden/etc.)
